validation_steps.name: tokenize_traditional_text
validation_steps.description: Tokenize every Traditional Chinese string into known lexical units.

validation_steps.name: resolve_token_to_vocab_id
validation_steps.description: Every token must map to exactly one vocab_id.

validation_steps.name: reject_unknown_token
validation_steps.description: If a token is absent from vocab_master.json, fail the build.

validation_steps.name: reject_future_vocab
validation_steps.description: If a token belongs to a future day, fail the lesson.

validation_steps.name: validate_grammar_reference
validation_steps.description: Every sentence grammar_id must exist in grammar_master.json.

validation_steps.name: validate_audio_reference
validation_steps.description: Every audio_id must exist in audio_manifest.json.

error_format.suggested_action: Add token to same-day vocab or replace sentence.
